name: Chocolate Hazelnut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulverize the vanilla wafers to powder in a food processor.
2. Melt the chocolate chips (microwave works well), taking care not to burn them.
3. Combine the pulverized wafers, melted chocolate, chopped hazelnuts, Frangelico liqueur, and corn syrup; mix until blended.
4. Form the mixture into bite-sized balls.
5. Roll each ball in powdered sugar, removing excess for an attractive marbled appearance and reduced dustiness during eating.
